The Ringer (2005)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $35,428,675Details
International Box Office $5,013,762
Worldwide Box Office $40,442,437
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $20,210,453
Total $20,210,453
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$5,158,795 (14.6% of total gross)
Legs:5.73 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:87.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:1,829 opening theaters/1,853 max. theaters, 4.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $65,379,699

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 23rd, 2005 (Wide) by Fox Searchlight
Video Release: May 16th, 2006 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for crude and sexual humor, language and some drug references.
Cast, crew, or production detail: Scene in End Credits
Plot point: False Identity, Gambling, Learning Disabilities, Medical and Hospitals, Money Troubles, Romance
Social setting: Olympics
Subgenre: Farcical / Slapstick Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production Countries: United States
